title: AN ACT TO AMEND ITEMS NINETEEN AND TWENTY, aa. LA UNION, PARAGRAPH I, TITLE B, OF SECTION ONE OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED ONE THOUSAND TWO HUNDRED. (Re Public Works Act.)

chunks.text:
H. No. 5064 / 52 OG No. 6, 2979 (June, 1956)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1433, June 14, 1956 ]

AN ACT TO AMEND ITEMS NINETEEN AND TWENTY, aa. LA UNION, PARAGRAPH I, TITLE B, OF SECTION ONE OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED ONE THOUSAND TWO HUNDRED. (Re Public Works Act.)

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Items nineteen and twenty, aa. La Union, paragraph I, title B, of section one of Republic Act Numbered One thousand two hundred, are amended to read as follows:

"(19) Leones-Macalva Tubao-Agoo

Completion芒聙娄芒聙娄芒聙娄芒聙娄芒聙娄芒聙娄芒聙娄芒聙娄芒聙娄芒聙娄P8,000.00

"(20) Sta. Teresa Road, Tubao

Completion芒聙娄芒聙娄芒聙娄芒聙娄芒聙娄芒聙娄芒聙娄芒聙娄芒聙娄芒聙娄.5,000.00"

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 14, 1956.
